description: AI漫剧场景资产库，包含场景类型、氛围设定、光影模板、透视参考

fields.name: 场景名称
fields.category: 室内/室外/奇幻/历史/科幻
fields.atmosphere: 氛围描述（宁静/压抑/宏大/温馨等）
fields.lighting: 光影描述（自然光/烛光/月光/逆光/侧光等）
fields.color_tone: 色调（暖调/冷调/高饱和/低饱和/黑白等）
fields.perspective: 透视（平视/俯视/仰视/鱼眼等）
fields.composition: 构图（三分法/对称/引导线/框架等）

entries.name: 示例场景 - 古城城楼
entries.atmosphere: 苍茫辽阔，肃杀中带一丝悲壮
entries.lighting: 黄昏逆光，暖橙色调，城墙阴影拉长
entries.color_tone: 暖调低饱和，橙黄+灰蓝主色
entries.perspective: 仰视城楼+平视远眺交替
entries.composition: 三分法，城墙线条引导视线至远方
entries.consistency_keywords: 古城，青砖城墙，城楼，黄昏，苍茫

prompt_templates.wide: Wide shot of [scene_name], [atmosphere], [lighting], [time_of_day], [weather], epic scale, cinematic, 8k, --ar 16:9
prompt_templates.detail: Detail shot of [scene_name], focusing on [element], [lighting], texture details, shallow depth of field, cinematic, 8k

entries.name: 示例场景 - 竹林小径
entries.lighting: 晨光透过竹叶，斑驳光影
entries.consistency_keywords: 竹林，青翠，薄雾，晨光，石径

prompt_templates.wide: Wide shot of bamboo forest path, morning mist, dappled sunlight through bamboo leaves, serene and mysterious, cinematic, 8k, --ar 16:9
prompt_templates.detail: Close-up of bamboo leaves with dew drops, soft morning light, bokeh background, nature photography, 8k
